title: I need help changing the primary email on my account because I no longer work for the company.
content: Hi! I had a firefox account when I worked for the law firm McCormick Barstow a few years ago. I haven't worked there for a few years. I just set up firefox on my personal computer, but am having problems changing my primary email from my work email (gina.axsom@mccormickbarstow.com) to my personal email (gaxsom@gmail.com). Can you help? I have no way of receiving any codes going to my old work email address which no longer exists. Thank you, Gina Axsom
